series_metadata.series_title: Published Departmental Reports, Policies, and Procedures
series_metadata.series_description: Published administrative policies, reports, procedures, and materials governing the operation, regulations, and/or procedures of the agency or an agency program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain two years after revised, superseded, or obsolete, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. If not transferred, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain two years after revised, superseded, or obsolete, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. If not transferred, destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
